# Visum

> A free AI-readiness scanner for any public website.

Visum reads any public website the way AI crawlers do — checking robots.txt permissions for AI bots, JSON-LD structured data, llms.txt, MCP endpoints, JavaScript rendering, meta tags, sitemap health, and page speed — and returns a 0–100 AI-visibility score with a prioritized fix list in about 20 seconds.

## Product

- [Run a scan](https://visum-eight.vercel.app/): Paste a URL, get your AI-visibility score. Free account, 3 free scans.
- [How the scan works](https://visum-eight.vercel.app/#how-it-works): The three-step flow from URL to diagnosis.
- [The 8 checks](https://visum-eight.vercel.app/#checks): Each technical signal we test and why it matters to AI systems.

## Company

- [About](https://visum-eight.vercel.app/about): What Visum is and where it's headed.
- [Contact](https://visum-eight.vercel.app/contact): Get in touch.
